review_text: My first motorhome trip as a retiree and I honestly didn’t know what to expect — but this park exceeded everything. It’s easily one of the best places we’ve stayed during our Tasmania trip. From the moment we arrived, Luke made us feel so welcome with his friendly and helpful nature. The amenities were immaculate. The setting is simply stunning. Whether you’re just starting your journey or finishing it, this park is a wonderful choice.
Brought our own camperven. Lovel staff, stunning location!
Excellent location with a view of the harbour outlet. Very courteous staff, clean well kept facilities and a great laundry

One of the strangest tourist parks we have ever been in. Laid out on a small peninsula sticking into Bass Strait it is quite exposed, but that is part of the charm. Laid out in a seemingly higgedly piggldy fashion, the sites are not clearly defined and seem to be all shapes and sizes. No matter, it was still an enjoyable experience, although the amenities we right at the top of a hill, a million miles away from some of the sites.

Caravan site was perfect.
The owners have excellent personal service.
Great location 👌

Loved our stay, the caravan park is well spread out, has amazing views and the ammenities are great with everything you need. Luke and Caroline were amazing during our stay, we lost our car keys 2 days before the spirit of tas and they couldn’t do enough to help us. They would do anything for their customers, I often saw Luke riding around the campsites speaking to everyone and helping anyone if they had any issues.

Love this caravan park, super clean, awesome peeps who run it, best place to stop straight off the boat, clean, so awesome we stayed 3 nights in our camper trailer. 10 minutes from the boat, excellent

Great caravan park, amenities were faultless and camp kitchen was terrific.  The hosts were incredibly friendly and helpful and even offered to drive us to our concert if we couldn’t secure an uber!  Amazing service.
We booked one night and wish we could have stayed longer! Stunning views, really clean and great location!

Brilliant - our first Caravan experience in Tasmania after disembarking the Spirit. A beautiful town easy drive from Devonport Terminal. The Van park an absolute gem - a magic location and very well maintained. Service experience amazing - from the original booking made many months ago to Luke assisting set up on site and sharing some history and local knowledge. Park fills up so with making a booking to avoid being disappointed. Room rating - assume site!
Pretty good caravan park, good toilets, would recommend- stayed before ferry

Great sea views & handy beach sidewalk to town.
The Cafe & restaurant at the Surf Club over the road are well worth the visit.

What a great little caravan park.
Beautiful location with ocean views and great park managers who have added lots of nice touches to make our stay very enjoyable.
Everything clean, fully functional and well done.
Looking forward to staying there again.
At a powered site for my motorhome

Great caravan park. If you’re not a fan of reversing don’t worry. The guys here help you get in no dramas at all.
Great view.
Can have fires.
Gets windy.
Amazing location right opposite the beach and an easy walk/ride into town. Staff are so friendly and helpful with great amenities. Highly recommend.
Well maintained. Great views. A team that cares. Podium finish for the best parks we have stayed at. We will be back.
Couldn't beat the service and location. We had a van site.

We stayed here after getting off the Spirit of Tasmania. When we booked Luke was pushed to fit us in as it was coming up to the Australia day holiday. Hubby had organized a car service and  this caravan park was the closest to the garage to cycle back from. Luke couldn't give us the 4 nights we wanted but we got 3 nights. On arriving at the park Luke and Caroline were so organized, they were there to greet everyone arriving off the ferry even though it was coming up to 8pm. He showed us to our site and guided us in. They are very welcoming and friendly and the park has a great feel to it.
The park is  rustic right on the front with lovely views of the beach and ocean and just a short walk to the light house.
There's a camp kitchen covered BBQ area and outdoor seating. The amenities were clean with timed showers, the water was hot with a good flow. There's a laundry and clothes lines. Everything you need for a great stay. That's why it was so busy with all his regulars returning for the Australia day weekend. I would definitely stay there again if returning for a stay in Devenport. Highly recommend

One of the best! Very friendly staff and the owners Luke and Carolyn were amazing. We appreciated the hospitality and were sad to leave this beautiful park. We can’t wait to come back!
Donna and Jimmy

If you‘re happy spending the money, definitely come to Mersey Bluff Caravan Park. It is really worth checking out. My favourite part definitely was the amazing view from the campground onto the ocean. Stunning view to wake up to.

Also very satisfied with the service, the clean facilities, cooking options etc.

Tip: we were advised to go and check out the penguins at a beach just out of Devonport. What a highlight in summer! But please be advised to be respectful to these little creatures and follow the instructions provided at the beach.🐧
Took us in from the Tassie Boat with very short notice. Great service and facilities, right on the beach. Will definitely visit again.
excellent location and great hospitality from Luke!
Clean well resourced and fantastic views and walks - good camp kitchen area, laundry and clean showers and loos together. ||Lots of wildlife after dark!
Very nice Caravan Park. The host is very friendly, everything is clean and managed very good.
Amazing owners and fabulous location!

Ditto to all other positive reviews. Luke couldn’t have been more welcoming or helpful when we arrived from the ferry. It’s one thing to operate a nice caravan park with good location and scenic outlook as he does, but to also take good care of your guests after they’ve had a long  trip and show them to their sites is next level. We’re also leaving Tassie via this park it was so good.
Wonderful views over Bluff Beach.
My go to for accommodation in Devonport

Avoid & here’s why.
The first thing you encounter is the smell, then what causes the smell on your shoe, wallaby dung at every step, then you go to have a nice warm shower, push the button to get hot water, then 4.5 minutes later the hot water stops, no other state has the audacity to impose such a disrespectful idea on people & it’s freezing their in mid December. Pros - well, non you can’t get in another million places in Australia, the owner says & quote - it would cost a fortune to not have hot water timers unquote. So to that I think, well every other state has no problem, but they did give me a wave from their 120k tricked up 4WD🤕
add to that the sign in the ammenities that reads - Feel free to wipe down the benches, now ask yourself why it would be written like that, as a Phycologist I can ashore you the hot water mentality showcases what the park management thinks of its guests, so again Avoid.
Ps- the sign on the back of the shower door says - Please turn taps off. Now the reason it says that is due to the hot water stopping, it does not just get cold it stops altogether, so if they have not been turned off and you push the button then get ready for a burst of cold water, keep in mind your already freezing, so the previous person hasn’t turned off the tap, but can you blame them, all they are doing is reaching for cloths to get warm, yeah big avoid

Fantastic location owners were super helpful right down to backing in the van I didn’t even need to get out saved the husband and I from having our little reversing fight 🤣 amenities were excellent and spotless great ocean view
We loved this park. So far the best park we have stayed in during our Tassie visit.

This park is easily one of the best we’ve visited during our trip to Tasmania. From the moment we met the owner, Luke, he was incredibly welcoming and helpful. The amenities were spotless, and the laundry offered modern washers and dryers. The location is absolutely breathtaking. Whether it’s your first night or your last, this park is the perfect pick.

The most awesome location in Tassie.
The staff are so accommodating. Always stay hear before and after sailing on the spirit

We stayed in cabin number 1. Fantastic view of the ocean and harbour and to watch the SOT and others arrive and depart. Large,clean cabin. Shower was a bit low in pressure but everything thing else good. Well worth the stay.

Luke was welcoming gave me a sheltered site for my tent. $35 pn. Perfect location for a walk along tge bluff or into town. 5 kms ride in the morning to the ferry terminal. Camp kitchen beautiful and warm. Great facilities.
Great sites, just a little noisy compared to other camp grounds
Great spot and great hosts
Great views very friendly hosts very clean
Fantastic location. Great sites and amenities. Luke is very helpful.

Couldn't fault the place. Luke was friendly and very helpful and made us feel welcome. He also provided some great tips to enjoy Devonport. The location is amazing and the beach is only across the road. I managed to get a site overlooking the beach and needless to say it was an amazing view to wake up to.

The park is very well maintained. It is a credit to Luke and Carolyn.

We will be back! staff were super lovely, we had a great stay !!

Toilets and shower were clean and tidy
Kitchen was nice and big and heaps of room
Outside area big table and bbq area

Fire pits on sites to have personal little fire to keep warm

Absolutely beautiful location, showers and toilet always clean and tidy, laundry was great, kitchen was so nice and big and had an outdoor bbq bit. Loved all the fire pit around the site so people could have there own little fire on there site. And the view was the best

Staff were super lovely we 100% will be back!!
Wow what a fantastic location congrats Luke on a beautiful park cheers from WA travellers.

We arrived at the park at 0145 in the morning due to the Spirit being diverted back to Geelong due to a medical emergency on board. Luke was up and ready to welcome us at that ungodly hour after a long tiring day. That’s service!! Thankyou Luke! Woke up to a spectacular view this morning of the beach.
What a beautiful piece of paradise. The view

Excellent spot
Friendly staff /owners
Excellent facilities
Excellent walks all around
Lots of wildlife
Great location for the Glow Run.
Out favourite camp site so far on our trip round Tasmania. Beautiful views, well laid out pitches and good facilities.

Best Caravan Park in Tassie !
Perfect location on the water with cafes & restaurants along the walk way,playgrounds ect.
Mandy was looking after the park on my visit she was amazing,so helpful & kind.
Can have a fire pit too.
Definitely recommend
Excellent service from Mandy on check-in. Clean facilities (toilets, showers, laundry, camp kitchen). Beautiful location, great views from campsite.
Lovely helpful staff, modern clean comfortable cabins, great views in picturesque location

This is a lovely park overlooking the head of the Mersey River.  The amenities are very good except for the push button showers.  The people are lovely and the kitchen is excellent.  We had a terrific stay.

Stayed here for a week. We had one of the cabins. Great location, with guest amenities. The only down fall on our last night/morning the power circuit kept cutting out pretty much leaving us with no power. However, I would like to mention how quickly Mandy responded to our issue. She went above and beyond to make the last of our stay as relaxing as possible, running back and forth in the rain and brought us coffee on our last morning. Couldn't be more grateful for your service, so thankyou for your hard efforts. We appreciated your hospitality🙂

Excellent location.  Very clean amenities,  love that the radio is on in amenities block. Beautiful scenery and kind people at reception.
We were in a mobile van.
Deffinely stay here again.

Great Location
Lovely staff. Facilities are clean and well kept.
I just wish dog owners would realise the rules in place do refer to them. Most dogs were not on leads. The guest information clearly states where your dog is allowed.

Great position, overlooking the beach & surf club. Very close proximity to Spirit of Tasmania. |Staff  went above & beyond for us, nothing was too much trouble. Also, very knowledgeable regarding things you see & do. Very clean facilities, bike riding tracks & walks close by. |Devonport city within 10 minutes. |Highly recommend

Loved staying here. Best service and facilities.
Would definitely stay again.

We stayed for the night before boarding the Spirit Of Tasmania In the morning. What a BRILLIANT caravan park! A great size but felt cozy & private. Bathroom & camp kitchen facilities were fabulous & modern & the views were just beautiful!! The people in the office & on site must have owned the park because it felt like they really cared about you having the best experience. THANK YOU! HIGHLY RECOMMEND!
Gorgeous location and Luke was so good. Great for the Ferry and you can have a fire in you own above ground pit.

Friendly and very helpful staff. Grounds kept neat and clean. Bathroom and laundry facilities were excellent also. The location on Mersey Bluff Beach is terrific. There is a lovely restaurant right across the road. Lighthouse is a short walk away and a great dog friendly beach behind the caravan park, a short 2 minute walk away. Highly recommend this park plus its convenient location for the Spirit of Tasmania arrival/departure.

Fantastic caravan park with great views and amenities.  Luke is the best host and takes you to your site.|If you are coming from or going to the Spirit of Tasmania or just looking for a few days in a lovely spot, this is the place for you.   Beautiful beach across the road
Fantastic Caravan Park in a great location!

Great place. Owner was super helpful getting a site with no notice. The amenities were super clean and the location was great too. Our kids loved it with the wildlife at night too as there were bandicoots and potoroos everywhere.

Everything
Starting off with arriving

Luke concierge me in and many many others, I believe he offers this service to everyone.  Magical area. Everything clean. Let your biodegradable water out on the dirt to water it. They are doing it right in every area
And safe!! Safe for women travellers
Thank you Caroline & Luke
You make Tasmania bright
We love this place! It's pretty clean and safe!  The staff is always kind. They are the best. We are definitely coming back!!!

We stayed here for three nights (Sat/Sun/Mon) with our small van. Luke, the manager, was absolutely great, firstly on the phone and then upon arrival. He will hop on his e-bike with his "follow me" vest and guide you to your spot. This is great because the sites are laid out fairly randomly, following the lay of the land. The park is adjacent to the beach and SLSC which has a great cafe and restaurant. Will definitely return to what has become our favourite park in Devonport!

Mersey  Bluff caravan park is in an amazing location, central to Devonport and the whole North West Coast of Tasmania.
Luke and Carolyn are outstanding, welcoming hosts and even escort you to your site. The ameneties are spotless.
I would highly reccommend a stay at this park.
Toller Campingplatz direkt am Leuchtturm. Gepflegt und sauber und Manager super freundlich. Vielen Dank für den schönen Aufenthalt.
Close to the beach
Camped so can’t comment on rooms. Awesome site 1st class service. Turned up late on motorcycles and couldn’t ask for more. Thank you heaps. Great stay
Beautiful spot . Friendly staff.
Best place for a holiday absolutely loved it

Absolutely lovely caravan park. Easy walk to beach,  town, cafes and restaurants without being crazy packed in like sardines.  It was so nice to wander back from the spotless amenities block and see groups sitting round camp fires enjoying the balmy evening. The powered sites area was busier than unpowered but still lovely.

Fantastic caravan park great facilities and location camping sites are great, close to beach and surf club and restaurant. Stones throw from shops so very convenient. Amenities are maintained very clean highly recommended staying here
Amazing spot next to the beach. Ammenities 10/10 and Luke was very welcoming always. Would def come back.

I am really sorry for their way of doing things! from the pitches for tents not very comfortable with earth and mud if it were to rain there it would be a disaster.. The prices for what they offer are really expensive.. 35$ dollars for a person and a small tent without a car, no electricity, not to mention the lack of seriousness the kitchen hours are from 6am to 10pm this morning I waited more than an hour for them to open there! I almost missed the ferry. I tried several times knocking on their reception door But no one opened for me.. they were there.. if there is a problem there is no one who can help you early in the morning or in the evening.. I will never go back there again.. to AVOID ABSOLUTELY!!!

We all Love this Van Park, incredible location for families, gorgeous clean water for a snorkel 🤿 with warm public showers near the SLSC, sunset on one side of the bluff and the other sunrise 🌅, cleanest amenities we have come across in a caravan park, friendly welcoming cruisie owners,  we couldnt recommend this park enough.  Thanks for having us, we hope to return Sarah, Tosh, Joel, Riley and Dan the Pug 🐶🐾🩵
The best of the best Caravan park
Nice place with all necessary services. Very friendly manager. Highly recommended !
Top 1 camping in Australia. Thank You !

Mersey Bluff Caravan Park has to be in one of the most picturesque locations in Tasmania. We were informed the day before our arrival of potential traffic hold ups which was a considerate gesture by the owners. The amenities block was always clean, in fact I think the cleaner was in there more frequently than I’ve ever seen before. A friendly park with friendly helpful staff!
Beautiful location and it is easy to access local area from this central location.Luke directs you onto your site and all staff are very helpful. Pet friendly. Highly recommend.
Toilets and showers beautiful and clean, and laundry spotless, nice to have a seat in there while waiting

Excellent family run caravan park set in the most amazing location. The park is very well maintained & the amenities are spotlessly clean. The staff are so friendly & accommodating from booking, check in/out & suggestions of things to see & do.  Sheltered by the wind at the base of Mersey Bluff & Lighthouse. Resident wallabies wander the park from dusk & will be a treat for overseas visitors & locals alike. |Located overlooking the beach, cafe/coffee shop with fabulous food together with the award winning Mrs Jones restaurant all within a 5 minute walk. |Kids are taken care of with a lovely park (including skate park) and flat easy bike paths for kms of walking/riding. |Highly recommend!

Amazing staff amazing views and overall wonderful place to stay !! I saw a complaint about four and half minutes in showed is not long enough well I washed my hair and had plenty of time ( medium long hair)
Cabin was very clean & easy access, bed to soft for my liking but can't please everyone. Excellent view over the water, highly recommend.

Getting on or off the Spirit of Tasmania you just have to stay here so easy.
Clean and flat sites and keep your eyes out for the enquisitive wildlife :)
Great, friendly staff

We stayed for 4 nights. The owners were so very welcoming and nothing was too much trouble. The ablution block was spotless and the bays were spacious. I highly recommend this caravan park even during the winter months. |Thank you Luke and Caroline for a lovely stay 😁
Clean caravan park and with the beautiful view. The manager Luke, is very informative and friendly
Nice location. Lots of cute pademelons. You should have more time in the showers because they only let you get 4.5 minutes. Overall, nice place.

Stayed here on the first amd last 3 nights  of my 3 week trip to tassie, Caroline and Luke have an amazing park in an amazing location. there facilities are amond the nicest, cleanest ever have i seen, surrounded by wildlife ,beautiful beaches i had an amazing stay in tassie. They truely need ti be thanked for there warm friendly and cosy atmosphere in which they have created. well done and thankyou and a special mention ti Joseph who stays up late to mop and clean again after everyone is asleep. a truely beautiful human . thankyou. from chris.

Magnificent views, friendly staff and clean   modern facilities. Sites are are well position with most giving excellent views. A great place to wake up in the morning and watch the the sun rise over the bay and mouth of the Mersy River. Close to all amenities.
Very helpful management staff for those arriving in the evening from the ferry.
Park was excellent very clean amenities staff & owners lovely and polite  the potaroos cute as so many of them

Fantastic park, with views of the Ocean and beautiful beach.  Luke the manager was sooo friendly and assisted everyone. Excellent facilities and beautiful views, especially sunrise. Each night, about 30 pademelons come down to feed off the lawn. The walk to the Lighthouse was only 5mins and fantastic rugged coastline. A walking path from the Lighthouse takes you to the blowhole and flat areas ,where people fished.
The Bluff Caravan Park, would have the best managers ( Carolynne & Luke) of any caravan park in Tas. 10/10. Highly recommend.

Stayed in the luxury cabin. Very comfortable, quiet with a great view.
Recommended.

Really enjoyed our time at Mersey Bluff.  Luke was very helpful, friendly and relaxed We had  beautiful views over the water from our site.  The amenities were clean,  showers hot and it was handy to everything,  especially the Spirit of Tasmania dock.  One of our top three parks in Tasmania, would definitely recommend staying here.
First class park and first class people. It will always be our first and last stop in and out of Devonport.

Luke and his staff are the most helpful and obliging people I have ever meet in a caravan park and I have stayed in a lot there service and friendliness is second to none thank you Luke for making our stay memorable.
Robert whittle.

Welcoming staff. Assistance with parking our caravan. Views of the ocean and local beach. Clean and well maintained amenities and grounds. Laundry and well appointed camp kitchen. Lovely relaxed atmosphere. We recommend this park.
Fantastic experience
A wonderful campsite with helpful hosts, clean and fully functioning facilities. Nothing less than 5 star quality!
Flattish sites. Great camp kitchen. Clean amenities.
Guided to our spot by very friendly owner. Great spot, some with views but unfortunately we had a van in front of us
Gorgeous location, fantastic ammenities, camp kitchen and clean toilets/showers and laundry. Gorgeous van site! Quite a busy spot but so close to shops etc!
Clean amenities. Great location. Friendly staff.
Great location, close to everything. Short walk down to the beach, great spot.

Pretty cool place staff we meet we friendly a bit of wild life close to a few things
Would stay again
Great spot, pet friendly, walk to the dog beach, friendly, helpful staff. Convenient for Spirit goers and spotless amenities.

We had a powered site for two nights after arriving on the Spirit in the morning. A great caravan park, spotlessly clean facilities and like previous reviews a fantastic location on a beautiful coastline. Luke and Carolyn were very helpful at all times. There is a great coffee shop opposite and a wonderful restaurant. In addition there are great bike riding tracks for those with bikes. We will be back.
Great park with great views, the hosts were very friendly and helpful, would stay here again. 👍
Very organised receiving us late off the ferry. Nice staff
Great place to stay coming off the SOT. Close to wharf. Great amenities and location.

All reviews live up to expections.  Carolyn & Luke are wonderful.  We had powered sites for 6 of us 3 vans($40 night)with absolute beach view.  Great camp kitchen, 5 minute showers (ample time) clean amenities close to everything and a short walk to light house.  A great little gem 💎 10/10

Luke is a great host. The park is great and very clean. Excellent spot to start or end your trip to Tassie.

If staying here have a splurge and visit Mrs Jones 100m away and have the pork dumpling and the tenderloin!

Grab a nice coffee at drift also just 100m away and a drink over looking the beach.
Fantastic place to stay
Our return stay here and yet again, very friendly helpful assistance from Luke and Carolyn. Facilities were spotless, sites grassed and flat. Thankyou for a lovely stay.

Checked into park late as we arrived on Spirit Of Tas, only 10 minute drive. Shown to our site and made to feel very welcome. Amenities were spotless, views amazing, clean site, great park for kids only a short walk away and a beautiful beach at your door step. Only a 1.5 hour drive to Cradle Mountain so a great middle ground. Really enjoyed our stay here, highly recommend :)

We arrived late from getting off the SOT and was still met on arrival and shown to our site. Sites we large and all seemed to have very great views. Facilities were clean all the times we used them. We ended up staying an extra night as well due to the weather. Highly recommend staying here.

The area that the Park is on belongs to council, however the business is run independent of the park. On arrival greeted by the owner who is very personable. The rate was good and even walked to guide us in place to a spot which was high on the hill, needless to say the view of the ocean superb. All facilities that you would see at other parks.
Owner was very helpful and friendly. The amenities and camp kitchen were top notch. Will definitely visit again.
Beautiful views, lots of night critters and a must stay caravan park.
